publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-07-13 00:04:58 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.persname: Blackall, Eric A. (Eric Albert.) (Title of work: Goethe and the novel..)

did.physdesc: Lecture notes, drafts, typescripts, biographical material, financial papers, correspondence, letters of recommendation, microfilm, audiocassettes, and department files.
did.abstract: Lecture notes, drafts and typescripts for articles and books, including Goethe and the Novel; also lecture notes and texts for his course "Great Moments in German Literature"; notes from Cambridge University; biographical material, financial papers, correspondence, letters of recommendation, and audiocassettes of Blackall's memorial service of 27 January 1990; and German Literature Department files.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Scholar and critic of German and Austrian literature. Cornell University Professor of German literature.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Lecture notes, drafts and typescripts for articles and books, including Goethe and the Novel; also lecture notes and texts for his course "Great Moments in German Literature"; notes from Cambridge University; biographical material, financial papers, correspondence, letters of recommendation, and audiocassettes of Blackall's memorial service of 27 January 1990; and German Literature Department files.

label.ref: Series II. Manuscript of unpublished German version of Goethe and the Novel; other manuscripts, drafts, and typescripts
Series III. Manuscripts, drafts, and typescripts; correspondence, records of the Department of German Literature at Cornell (RESTRICTED in part)
Series IV. Correspondence, records of the Department of German Literature at Cornell; biographical material; lectures
Series V. Cambridge University class notes; other miscellaneous papers

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Eric A. Blackall Papers, #14-18-2761. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: German literature -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Department of German Literature

1952 - The Gothic Language in its Teutonic Setting
Lectures I-IX - The Growth of the German Vocabulary
Lectures X-XVI - The Growth of the German Vocabulary

History of German Language - Second Year II
History of German Language - Third Year I
History of German Language - Third Year II
Chapter IV Gottsched and the Stabilization of the ....[?]
Chapter V Theory of Prose Style; Chapter VI Development of Narrative Prose
The Artistic Texture of Die Epigonen
Goethe and the Novel Part I
Goethe and the Novel Part II
Goethe and the Novel Form Chapter II
Goethe and the Novelists Chapter I
Lit. 309 Development of European Novel I
Novels of the Romantic Era I
Novels of the Romantic Era II
1957 - The Language of Sturm und Drang
The Buch des Unmuts in Goethe's West-Östlicher Divan
The Language of Heaven: Reflections of the Bergschluchten"
The Language of Goethe's Götz von Berlichingen
#2 "The Language of Heaven: Reflections of the Bergschluchten
#12 The Buch des Unmuts in Goethe's West-Östlicher Divan
Series II. Manuscript of unpublished German version of Goethe and the Novel; other manuscripts, drafts, and typescripts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note by Jean F. Blackall on Goethe und der Roman: "This is the original ms. and it is longer than the one subsequently published by the Cornell University Press in English. The English Version was written from this ms."

did.unittitle: Correspondence and Table of Contents re: projected posthumous Goethe book
Reviews of the German Romantic Novel
First copy - unpublished ms. of German Version of Goethe and the Novel
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 1-4
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 5-8
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 9-13
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 14-16
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 17-20
Second copy of Goethe und der Roman: German ms. of Goethe and the Novel (unpublished) 21-24
The Language of Sturm und Drang - 1957 paper
Series III. Manuscripts, drafts, and typescripts; correspondence, records of the Department of German Literature at Cornell (RESTRICTED in part)
Style II Emergence - Chapter 11 - The Prose of Maturity
Style II Chapter 10 - The Grand Manner
Style II Chapter 9 - The revival of metaphor
Style II Chapter 8 - The development of the poetical medium
Style II Chapter 7 - The Language of Poetry
Style III Emergence - Chapter 12 - Art and Feeling
Style III Chapter 14 - The Return to Origins
American Academy of Arts and Sciences
Series IV. Correspondence, records of the Department of German Literature at Cornell; biographical material; lectures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note by Jean F. Blackall: "In the file marked 'Various Lectures' and in folders throughout these boxes there are typescripts of many public lectures given by Eric Blackall. Though many of his lectures were published, I believe that there are others here which have not."

did.unittitle: Great Moments Lectures: Faust and the devils
Great Moments Lectures: Faust questioning Mephistopheles
Great Moments Lectures: Der römische Brunnen
Great Moments Lectures: Strasburg, Frankfurt, Wetzler, Weimar
Great Moments Lectures: Poems by Josef von Eichendorff
Great Moments Lectures: Romantic theory of poetry
Great Moments Lectures: The originality of Heinrich von Kleist
Great Moments Lectures: Stifter on the great and the small
Great Moments Lectures: Friedrich Schlegel - Universalpoesie
Great Moments Lectures: Schlegel - Selected fragments
Great Moments Lectures: Rilke's Ninth Duino Elegy
Great Moments Lectures: Brecht and Mutter Courage
Great Moments Lectures: Tieck - Die verkehrte Welt
["---wondrous picture that I can sketch for myself of music ..."]
Tristan and the language of love - stencil 7
A. W. Schlegel - Berlin Lectures (first sections)
The great moments in Goethe's Weimar drama
Selections of German Poetry from the Beginning to 1720 - for German 39-A
Selections from Twelve German Poets of the Nineteenth Century for German 39-C
Peasant Bardolatry: Uli Bräker and his Shakespeare book - paper, 1973
The Novels of the German Romantics - Lectures to Society for the Humanities
Sense and Nonsense in Wilhelm Meisters Lehrjahre
Series V. Cambridge University class notes; other miscellaneous papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note by Jean F. Blackall: "Eric gave a very popular course called `Great Moments in German Literature' - sometimes known as `Eric's Great Moments.' The lectures are among his papers but I do not know whether the selections to which they refer are identified other than by these mimeographs."

did.unittitle: Great Moments: Keller and the "golden superfluity of life"
Hauptmenn's Die Weber - High German translation
Material for History of the German Language
Contains folders 42-47 from Box 6, which are restricted until 2014
Microfilm: Nicolaus Vogt, Die Rhein am Rhein
Microfilm: Christian August Vulpius, Don Juan den Wüstling ...
Audiocassettes of Blackall's memorial service of 27 January 1990
